---
title: "5-assignment"
format: html
author: Emma Rasmussen
---

# Solar Project Valuation

## Planning

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(here)
knitr::include_graphics(here("5-assignment","flowchart.jpg"))
```

### Module Contract

Overall contract:

*Input:*

-   year, total years for project valuation

-   rate, discount rate

-   size, project size (kw)

-   om, operations and maintenance costs (\$/kw/yr)

-   construction, year 0 costs to build (\$/kw)

*Function:*

-   Module 1: Calculate expected annual revenue

-   Module 2: Discount revenue over project lifespan in years

-   Module 3: Discount operations and maintenance costs

-   Module 4: Sum all costs and revenue for total project value

*Final Output:* Net present value of the project over total project years (single \$ value)

#### Module 1: Calculate expected annual revenue

*Input:*

-   Historical hourly locational marginal price (LMP) of nearest node rates for previous year (\$/kWh)

-   Hourly power generation (kW) estimate for the latitude and longitude of selected site from SAM

*Function*: annual_rev = Sum(hourly kW \* (\$/KW) \[use For loop to sum (8760 values)\]

*Output:* Annual revenue estimate in \$/year

#### Module 2: Discount Revenue over project lifespan (years)

*Input:*

-   Module 1 output (annual_rev_result)

*Parameters:*

-   rate (Discount Rate)
-   year

*Function:* dis_rev = annual_rev/ (1 + rate) \^ year

*Output:* dis_rev, discounted revenue as single \$ value across project timeline

#### Module 3: Discount Operations and Maintenance Costs

*Input:*

-   om (System operations and maintenance cost (\$/kw/yr) )

*Parameters:*

-   rate (Discount Rate)

-   year

*Function:* dis_om= (size \* om)/(1+rate)\^year

*Output:* dis_om_result, discounted operations and maintenance cost as single \$ value across project timeline

#### Module 4: Estimate Net System Costs

*Input:*

-   Module 2 Output: dis_rev_result

-   Module 3 Output: dis_om_result

-   Construction (System Construction Cost in year 0 (\$/kw))

*Function:* net_npv = dis_rev_result - construction - dis_om_result

*Final Output:* Net present value of the project over total project years (single \$ value)

## Calling functions

```{r}
# Load Data 
solardf <- read.csv("solardata.csv")

# Clean Data
solardf_clean <- solardf |> 
  rename(time = Time.stamp, lmp = Dollar.per.kwh, kwh = System.power.generated..kW.)
```

```{r}
# Project Parameters 
params <- list(
  year = 25, 
  rate = 0.05, 
  size = 100000,
  om = 20.39, 
  construction = 1432
)
```

#### Module 1 Call

```{r}
annual_rev_result <- annual_rev(solardf_clean$lmp, solardf_clean$kwh)
```

#### Module 2 Call

```{r}
dis_rev_result <- dis_rev(annual_rev_result, params$year, params$rate )
```

#### Module 3 Call

```{r}
dis_om_result <- dis_om (params$om, params$size, params$year , params$rate)

```

#### Module 4 Call

```{r}

project_npv <- net_npv(params$construction, params$size)

```

####
